description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and frame, complemented by brown textured grips on both sides. The grip panels appear to be made of a checkered wood or polymer, providing a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, enclosing a curved trigger. The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and lacks external threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and minimally protrudes from the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. No visible engravings or markings are present on the slide or frame, giving the handgun a utilitarian and classic appearance.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with brown checkered grips and a flat magazine base, featuring a classic, unmarked slide.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the rear, showing the slim profile of the slide and grip, with the hammer and rear sight barely visible.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the slide, the brown checkered grip, the trigger guard, and the flat magazine base.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the muzzle opening, the rounded trigger guard, and the symmetry of the slide and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the brown grip, slide, and the clean, unmarked surface of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a rectangular, slightly contoured shape with pronounced checkering for enhanced traction. The brown panels appear to be made of wood or textured polymer, secured with visible screws. The checkered pattern covers most of the grip surface, providing a tactile, non-slip hold. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving the grip a classic and utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, forming a smooth arc around the trigger. It is of standard size, with no undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessory rails. The surface is smooth and untextured, with no reinforcement or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or fluting are present.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unmarked, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It is minimally protrusive and maintains a streamlined, unobtrusive profile, with no visible logos or texturing.
